title: my ai bot
author: onlysatira
selftext:
Guys, I wrote below about my bot, I have already helped many with writing code, someone I sold my bot. If you also want to get a bot or some kind of consultation, write to me, do not hesitate.

Just please don’t write to me: please send me your bot for free, I’ll pay as soon as I earn.

I spent a lot of time and money not to give away my efforts

Best regards: Satira

replies.author: AltruisticKoalaa
replies.body: Show me proof of ur ai bot and I’ll remove my comments
